demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult child present and helping today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My upper stomach feels heavy and painful, my heart is suddenly fluttering constantly, and I simply don't have the energy to get out of bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The fluttering heartbeat started a few hours ago and hasn't stopped, I'm getting a bit puffed just moving, and the ache under my right ribs has been building all week — my adult child rang because I couldn't get up.

symptom_narrative.onset: the fluttering heartbeat came on suddenly about 4 hours ago; the fatigue and right-sided tummy ache have been building over the past week
symptom_narrative.duration: heartbeat about 4 hours and constant; fatigue about a week and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: the heartbeat feels fast and irregular, like it's skipping and racing at the same time; the tummy pain is a dull, heavy, constant ache high up under the right ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the tiredness is so bad I'm stuck in bed today; the heartbeat is frightening because it won't settle
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up on the right side of my belly, under the ribs; the fluttering is in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fatigue has crept up over the week; the heartbeat has been going non-stop since it started this afternoon
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; resting doesn't stop the fluttering
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even small effort like moving in bed leaves me short of breath
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling a bit breathless when I move, and completely wiped out; my adult child says my skin has gone a strange bronze-grey colour over the last couple of years
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had this fluttering heartbeat before; the tiredness and the aches in my hands have been there a long time
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound today — I can't get up or do anything for myself

past_medical_history.how_managed: a tablet the doctor started me on

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: aches and stiffness in the knuckles of both hands, especially the first couple of finger joints, for a long time
my sex drive has dropped right off over the last while

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: I do have a drink most days
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adult child is with me and made the call because I couldn't get out of bed

objective_data_offered.value: skin over the face and forearms has turned a bronze / slate-grey colour, most noticeable in areas that get sun; developed gradually over about two years
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the adult child over chat; not a clinician inspection

objective_data_offered.value: looks chronically unwell and exhausted, is lying in bed and unable to get up, getting puffed with minimal movement
can feel his heart racing and beating irregularly in his chest, continuously for the last few hours
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a felt sensation reported by the patient, not a measured heart rate or rhythm
